name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Bakersfield, CA ACE Cash Express at 2707 S H Street offers fast payday loans, cash advances, and title loans to residents.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is located at 2707 S H Street A in Bakersfield, CA, offering convenient access to quick cash loans and advances. The Bakersfield storefront operates Monday through Thursday 9 AM to 6 PM, Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, with Sunday closures. This standalone location serves the local community's immediate cash needs.

At this Bakersfield ACE Cash Express, you can access payday loans, title loans, and cash advances without lengthy approval processes. Call +1 661-837-9932 to inquire about loan terms, required documentation, and available amounts before visiting.

For Bakersfield residents seeking immediate funding, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information. ACE Cash Express specializes in quick approval when traditional lenders are not an option.
address: 2707 S H St A, Bakersfield, CA 93304

company_info.headquarters: 2707 S H St A, Bakersfield, CA 93304

pros: Multiple service offerings: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services in one location
Online lending options available alongside physical store network for flexible access
Same-day or next-day funding capability implied by emergency-cash category positioning
Responsive to regional emergencies with customer communication (Hurricane Ida store closure updates)
State-specific compliance messaging (California Notice at Collection) shows regulatory awareness
Multiple customer service channels: phone and email support for general inquiries and online lending
Convenient store locator tool for finding physical locations
cons: Website contains multiple broken links and 404 errors preventing access to location-specific information and service details
No transparent rate or APR information available on provided website content
State-specific product restrictions prevent uniform service availability (message: 'this type of loan is not available in this state')
Limited visibility into actual loan terms, eligibility requirements, and cost disclosures
Physical store locations reportedly closed in some areas due to operational disruptions
best_for: Consumers seeking same-day or next-day emergency cash in states where ACE operates
Customers who prefer in-person financial transactions at physical store locations
Individuals needing bundled services like check cashing and bill payments alongside short-term loans
People with vehicle title assets interested in title-secured lending options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in their service areas who need immediate cash access and prefer either physical store interactions or online lending channels. The main caveat is that the broken website infrastructure limits transparency on actual terms, rates, and eligibility—consumers must contact ACE directly or visit stores to obtain complete loan pricing and disclosure information before committing.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 2707 S H St, Bakersfield, CA. Fast payday loans and cash advances with same-day funding available.
